news.t: ProShares Reduces Fees for S&P 500 Ex-Sector ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SPXN is an equity ETF with a total of 397 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.06%, Apple at 7.77%, Microsoft at 5.27%, Amazon.com at 4.24%, and Alphabet at 3.83%.

overview.description: The ProShares S&P 500 Ex-Financials ETF (SPXN) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Ex-Financials & Real Estate index, a market-cap-weighted index of US large-cap stocks, excluding firms in the financial and real estate sectors. SPXN was launched on Sep 22, 2015 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Reduces Fees for S&P 500 Ex-Sector ETFs
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares has lowered the fees on its suite of S&P 500 Ex-Sector ETFs, which allow investors to own the S&P 500 without an unwanted economic sector.
